prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华东理工大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约7025名、7567名、7037名、7651名、7983名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021至2022年位次后移约542名，2023年短暂回升至7037名，随后2024年再次后移至7651名，2025年进一步后移至7983名。近3年累计后移约946名，2025年基准位次约7983名，后移趋势明显；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为27人，2025年扩至32人；2026年计划仍为32人，与2025年持平。计划未进一步扩招，在考生总数大幅增长的背景下，竞争压力有所上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华东理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第45名稳步上升至2026年第42名，排名持续提升，学校综合实力和认可度有所增强；2022年声誉曾因校园安全事件偏负面，但近年未见重大负面舆情；抖音热度评级为「较热」，在全部高校中排名第34位，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，对报考关注度有一定正面影响；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+（全国顶尖），化学获评A-，控制科学与工程获评A-。化学工程与技术为该校王牌学科，与工科试验班（智慧化工）等招生专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度为「高热推荐」；电气工程及其自动化热度持续升温；而化工类（属生化环材大类）社会舆论为「明显劝退」，可能对相关专业报考产生一定抑制。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。省控线数据已纳入参考，2025年本科批430分，近年波动不大；华东理工大学位于上海市，在北京市招生计划约32人，占比较小；上海作为一线城市对北京考生有一定地域吸引力，但跨省报考本身存在一定门槛。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平未扩招、北京市考生总数大幅增长约29.7%导致竞争加剧、软科排名稳步上升等因素，在2025年基准位次7983名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧，位次继续后移。预测2026年最低录取位次约8103名，波动区间7603–8603名。

一档（最难进）

- 计算机类
- 电子信息类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 机械类（机械智能化实验班）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8103名，区间7603–8603名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（7603名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（8603名附近）建议以三档工科试验班及经济学类为主，稳妥填报。华东理工大学化工A+学科实力突出，虽属劝退大类但对科研深造方向考生仍有较高价值。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for East China University of Science and Technology in the comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 7025, 7567, 7037, 7651, and 7983, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2022, the ranking moved back by about 542 places; in 2023, it briefly recovered to 7037; then in 2024, it moved back again to 7651; and in 2025, it further moved back to 7983. Over the past three years, the cumulative backward movement is about 946 places, with the baseline ranking in 2025 being approximately 7983, indicating a clear backward trend. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Beijing was 27 students from 2021 to 2024, expanding to 32 students in 2025; the plan for 2026 remains at 32 students, unchanged from 2025. With no further expansion in the plan and a significant increase in the total number of examinees, competitive pressure has risen.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, with continuous improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, its reputation was somewhat negative due to a campus safety incident, but no major negative public opinion has been seen in recent years. Its Douyin heat rating is 'relatively hot,' ranking 34th among all universities, with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, which has a certain positive impact on application attention. No obvious records of admission gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+ (top in the country), Chemistry was rated A-, and Control Science and Engineering was rated A-. Chemical Engineering and Technology is the university's flagship discipline, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering), which has a strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication majors have a social heat rating of 'highly recommended'; Electrical Engineering and Automation is increasingly popular; while chemical engineering (belonging to the biology, chemistry, environment, materials category) has a social opinion of 'clearly discouraged,' which may suppress applications for related majors. The total number of Beijing Gaokao examinees in 2026 is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, with a significant increase in the number of examinees, leading to intensified competition. Provincial control line data has been included for reference; in 2025, the undergraduate batch line was 430 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, with an enrollment plan of about 32 students in Beijing, accounting for a small proportion. As a first-tier city, Shanghai has a certain regional appeal to Beijing examinees, but cross-province applications inherently have certain thresholds.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026 with no expansion, the significant increase of about 29.7% in the total number of Beijing examinees leading to intensified competition, and the steady rise in Soft Science rankings, it is expected that competition will further intensify based on the baseline ranking of 7983 in 2025, with the ranking continuing to move back. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 8103, with a fluctuation range of 7603 to 8603.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science and Technology (Double Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Computer Class
- Electronic Information Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligence and Robotics)
- Mechanical Class (Mechanical Intelligence Experimental Class)
- Physics Class
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Energy and Environment)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Biomedicine)
- Economics Class
- International Economics and Trade.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 8103, range 7603–8603. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 7603), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Class and Electronic Information Class; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 8603), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Classes and Economics Class for stable application. East China University of Science and Technology's A+ Chemical Engineering discipline is outstanding, and although it belongs to the discouraged category, it still holds high value for candidates aiming for scientific research and further studies.

_translation.university_name_en: East China University of Science and Technology
